name: Motherson Sumi Systems Limited
summary: Motherson Sumi Systems Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of components to automotive original equipment manufacturers in India and internationally. It operates in MSSL Standalone, SMR, SMP, PKC, and Others segments. The company provides cutting edge electrical and electronics distribution systems, related components, and associated design services; cockpits, instrument-panel and door-trim modules, decorative interior and exterior parts, bumper fascias, front-end modules, door handles, roof rails, lighting products, and plastic body parts; and basic full plastic types and high value exterior and interior mirrors with various integrated electronic features and aesthetic surfaces, as well as high-performance rearview camera monitoring systems. It also offers a range of products in precision metal-machined parts, metal turning, and plastic metal combined parts for the automotive industry and other industries, including scientific and engineering applications. In addition, the company designs, manufactures, and integrates electrical distribution systems, electronics, and related components for commercial vehicle industries, rolling stock manufacturers, and other related segments. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Noida, India.
